name: Buford Indoor Golf
about: Buford Indoor Golf is an indoor facility equipped with state-of-the-art golf simulators, offering a comprehensive environment for practice, lessons, and gameplay. The venue provides high-quality bays in a relaxed atmosphere, allowing golfers to play regardless of weather conditions such as heat, cold, rain, or darkness. Services include individual and junior golf lessons, corporate and birthday party packages, and specialized offerings like golf simulator installation and custom golf balls. The facility caters to those seeking a dedicated space for skill development and on-course simulation.
why_golfers_like_it: Cutting-edge golf simulators for all weather play
Comprehensive lesson programs and junior academy
Flexible party and corporate event packages

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify club rental policies. It is recommended to bring your own clubs or contact the venue directly for information.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of BYOB or external food policies on the website. Please contact the venue for clarification.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide an estimated duration for a full 18-hole simulation. This information may be available upon inquiry.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Buford Indoor Golf offers a Junior Golf Academy and Birthday Party Packages, indicating it is suitable for children.
